text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Seiyah! Take this! Kyaaah! Hngh, ya! Ha! Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Guh... How many times is that now? Could my
opponent be reading my moves?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Argh! This isn't good... If I can't keep my mind as
still as water at all times, then I still have a long
way to go... Grrr...
